body:
## Purpose 
This PR bumps the ClimaAtmos minor version. This is needed after #1698 so that we can propagate the right compat dependencies to the downstream packages (e.g., Coupler)


## Content
- Bumped minor version


Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

----
- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Bump version

body: This PR updates to the latest ClimaCore, including fixes for ClimaComms context, needed for GPU support.
title: Update to latest ClimaCore

body:
Reduce allocations by specializing the `conditional_assign!` function, used in the old EDMF.
See [here](https://docs.julialang.org/en/v1/manual/performance-tips/#Be-aware-of-when-Julia-avoids-specializing) - 
`g_func(g::Function, num) = ntuple(g, div(num, 2))` will not specialize, but 
`h_func(h::H, num) where {H} = ntuple(h, div(num, 2))` does.

Thanks @simonbyrne
title: Fix conditional_assign! allocations
